title: RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance or deposit/first month's rent assistance. Amount of assistance depends on available funding. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Must have 72-hour eviction notice or be homeless. Other eligibility requirements based on available funding. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm (503) 585-6688 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1/2 mile north of Market Street on the west side of Front Street. Cherriots bus routes 9,19 Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS FOOD - FOOD PANTRY UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY
